title: Severe Tropical Cyclone in Bay of Bengal
description: Category 4 tropical cyclone with sustained winds of 230 km/h approaching Mumbai coast. All port operations suspended. Vessels advised to seek shelter or divert. Storm surge warning of 3-5 meters issued for coastal areas.

timeline.event: Cyclone formed in Bay of Bengal

recommendedActions: Immediately reroute all inbound vessels to alternate ports (Mundra or Cochin)
Notify affected shippers of 5-7 day delay estimates
Activate contingency warehousing at inland facilities
Monitor cyclone trajectory updates every 3 hours

title: Armed Piracy Attack Near Gulf of Aden
description: Two commercial vessels attacked by armed pirates approximately 120 nautical miles south of Aden. One vessel boarded and crew held hostage. Coalition naval forces responding. All vessels advised to maintain maximum distance from reported coordinates.

timeline.event: Distress signal received from MV Pacific Dawn
Second vessel MV Atlantic Star reports approach by armed skiffs
IMB confirms piracy attack in progress

recommendedActions: Reroute all vessels via Cape of Good Hope corridor
Activate onboard security protocols for vessels in the region
Coordinate with naval escorts for high-value cargo
Issue crew safety advisory for all vessels within 200nm radius

title: Port Workers Strike at Rotterdam
description: Dockworkers union has declared an indefinite strike affecting all container terminal operations. Estimated 15,000 TEUs of cargo affected daily. Negotiations between union and port management are ongoing with no resolution in sight.
recommendedActions: Divert vessels to Antwerp or Hamburg terminals
Expedite customs clearance for pre-strike arrived cargo
Notify all booked shippers of potential 3-5 day delays
Prepare alternative routing plans for European hub traffic

title: Collision Between Container Ships in Singapore Strait
source: Maritime and Port Authority of Singapore
description: Two container vessels collided in the eastbound lane of Singapore Strait causing partial channel blockage. Minor fuel spill detected. Traffic management system activated with reduced speed limits. Salvage operations expected to take 48-72 hours.

timeline.event: Eastbound lane restricted to one-way traffic

recommendedActions: Expect 12-24 hour delays for Singapore-bound traffic
Consider Tanjung Pelepas as alternative transshipment hub
Monitor oil spill containment updates
Adjust vessel schedules for reduced strait capacity

title: Earthquake Damages Port of Manila Infrastructure
description: 6.8 magnitude earthquake struck near Manila causing significant structural damage to pier facilities and crane infrastructure. Two berths collapsed. Tsunami advisory briefly issued then cancelled. Full port closure enacted pending structural assessment.

timeline.event: 6.8M earthquake detected — epicenter 45km SW of Manila
Port of Manila closed for all operations
Tsunami advisory issued and later cancelled

recommendedActions: Divert all Manila-bound vessels to Subic Bay or Cebu
Activate force majeure clauses for affected contracts
Coordinate with local authorities for relief cargo priority
Expect 2-4 week port closure minimum

title: Suspicious Mine Sighting in Black Sea
description: Multiple drifting naval mines reported in the northwestern Black Sea shipping lanes. Mine countermeasure vessels deployed. All commercial shipping suspended in a 50nm exclusion zone around reported positions.

timeline.event: Turkish coast guard reports mine sighting

recommendedActions: Suspend all Black Sea transit operations immediately
Reroute grain exports through Romanian or Bulgarian ports
Obtain updated war risk insurance coverage
Monitor NATO SHIPPING advisory updates

title: Severe Fog Causing Delays at Busan
description: Dense fog with visibility below 200 meters affecting Busan port approaches and harbor. Pilot services suspended until visibility improves. 23 vessels currently at anchor awaiting berth clearance.
recommendedActions: Delay berthing schedules by 12-18 hours
Notify downstream ports of cascading delays
Activate fog delay protocol for documentation

title: Oil Tanker Fire at Port of Bandar Abbas
description: Large oil tanker caught fire during loading operations at berth 7. Fire suppression teams from three agencies responding. Adjacent berths evacuated. Partial port closure affecting petroleum and LNG operations.

timeline.event: Fire detected on tanker during loading
Fire partially contained — no crew injuries reported

recommendedActions: Divert petroleum cargo to Fujairah or Sohar port
Assess environmental impact and comply with local regulations
Prepare insurance claims for affected cargo

title: Customs Systems Outage at Hong Kong
source: Hong Kong Customs and Excise Department
description: Electronic customs clearance system experiencing intermittent failures causing delays in cargo processing. Manual fallback procedures activated but processing capacity reduced by approximately 60%.
recommendedActions: Pre-stage all documentation for manual processing
Expect 24-48 hour customs clearance delays
Consider Shenzhen as alternative clearance point

title: Container Spill and Hazmat Leak at Durban
description: Stack collapse during heavy winds caused 14 containers to fall, rupturing two containers carrying hazardous chemical cargo. Exclusion zone of 500m established around container yard section B. Port operating at 70% capacity.

timeline.event: Container stack collapse during 80 km/h wind gusts
Hazmat leak detected — exclusion zone established

recommendedActions: Reroute hazmat cargo to Cape Town if possible
Review container stacking protocols for wind conditions
File incident report with hazmat regulatory authority

title: Typhoon Warning for South China Sea
description: Tropical storm forming east of Vietnam with potential to intensify to typhoon strength within 48 hours. Ports in southern Vietnam on heightened alert. No operations suspended yet but preparations underway.

timeline.event: Storm watch issued for southern Vietnam

recommendedActions: Begin pre-positioning of port equipment and securing loose cargo
Accelerate vessel loading/unloading operations
Prepare vessel shelter plans

title: Congestion Crisis at Port of Shanghai
description: Record congestion with 87 vessels waiting at anchor, average wait time 4.5 days. Peak season volume combined with equipment shortage causing significant backlog across all terminals.
recommendedActions: Consider Ningbo-Zhoushan as alternative discharge port
Negotiate priority berthing with terminal operators
Adjust supply chain schedules for 5-day buffer

title: Drone Incursion Disrupts Port of Dubai Operations
description: Unauthorized drone activity detected over the port restricted airspace causing temporary suspension of crane operations for 4 hours. Security forces neutralized the threat. Operations have resumed with enhanced surveillance.
recommendedActions: No further action needed — incident resolved
Request updated port security status before arrival
Verify no cargo handling delays from suspension period

title: Fuel Shortage at Port of Mombasa
description: Bunkering fuel stocks running low due to supply chain disruptions. Vessels requiring refueling may face 2-3 day delays. Alternative bunkering available at Dar es Salaam.

timeline.event: Fuel reserve drops below critical threshold

recommendedActions: Pre-arrange bunkering at alternative ports
Calculate fuel consumption for extended voyage if bypassing Mombasa

title: Cargo Theft Ring Busted at Santos
description: Brazilian Federal Police dismantled an organized cargo theft ring operating within the port. Enhanced security screening now in effect causing minor processing delays.

timeline.event: Police raid on port warehouse facilities

recommendedActions: Verify integrity of any stored cargo at Santos
Request detailed cargo inspection for high-value shipments

title: IT Ransomware Attack on Antwerp Terminal Systems
description: Major ransomware attack has encrypted terminal operating systems at two Antwerp container terminals. Gate operations offline, automated stacking cranes non-functional. Manual operations providing minimal throughput.
recommendedActions: Divert vessels to Rotterdam or Zeebrugge
Verify electronic documentation backups exist
Engage cybersecurity insurance coverage
Expect 5-10 day recovery timeline for full operations

title: Flooding at Port of Chittagong
description: Monsoon-related flooding has inundated low-lying areas of the port compound. Container yard sections C and D partially submerged. Road access to the port restricted. Port operating at 50% capacity.

timeline.event: Container yards C and D flooded

recommendedActions: Delay non-urgent cargo to allow floodwater recession
Inspect all grounded containers for water damage
Coordinate with inland transport providers for road closures

title: Crane Malfunction at Felixstowe Terminal
description: Two ship-to-shore cranes at Trinity Terminal experiencing mechanical failures. Maintenance teams working on repairs with estimated 24-hour resolution. Remaining cranes handling operations with minor delays.

timeline.event: Crane STS-09 taken offline for preventive inspection

recommendedActions: Factor 6-12 hour additional handling time for vessels
Consider Southampton as alternative for time-critical cargo

title: Environmental Protest Blocking Savannah Port Access
description: Environmental activist group briefly blocked the main truck access road to the port for approximately 6 hours before dispersal by law enforcement. Port operations were not directly affected but trucking in/out was delayed.

timeline.event: Road cleared by law enforcement — access restored

recommendedActions: No further action needed — access fully restored
Check for any truck delivery delays from the disruption period

title: Suspected Sanctions Violation at Salalah
description: Omani authorities have detained a vessel suspected of carrying sanctioned cargo. Enhanced inspection protocols activated for all vessels calling at Salalah. Expect additional screening delays of 12-24 hours.

timeline.event: Intelligence report on suspected vessel received

recommendedActions: Ensure all cargo documentation is complete and accurate
Allow 24-hour buffer for enhanced screening
Verify sanctions compliance for all consignees
